description: STEPPER modeled as Lock
DEP_CHAMBER modeled as Lock
ETCH_CHAMBER modeled as Lock
METROLOGY_STATION modeled as Lock
MONITOR modeled as Lock
channel from LITHOGRAPHER to METROLOGY_ENGINEER for pattern_ready
channel from DEPOSITOR to METROLOGY_ENGINEER for film_ready
channel from ETCHER to METROLOGY_ENGINEER for etch_ready
channel from METROLOGY_ENGINEER to PROCESS_CONTROLLER for measurement reports (dimensions_report, thickness_report, profile_report)
channel from PROCESS_CONTROLLER to LITHOGRAPHER for litho_validated
channel from PROCESS_CONTROLLER to DEPOSITOR for dep_validated
channel from PROCESS_CONTROLLER to ETCHER for etch_validated
channel from PROCESS_CONTROLLER to INTEGRATION_ENGINEER for all_validated
channel from INTEGRATION_ENGINEER to LITHOGRAPHER for lot_disposition
channel from INTEGRATION_ENGINEER to DEPOSITOR for lot_disposition
channel from INTEGRATION_ENGINEER to ETCHER for lot_disposition
METROLOGY_ENGINEER measures only after receiving process-ready notifications from fab agents
PROCESS_CONTROLLER validates only after receiving all three measurement reports
LITHOGRAPHER/DEPOSITOR/ETCHER enter Phase 2 only after receiving validation from PROCESS_CONTROLLER
INTEGRATION_ENGINEER begins qualification only after receiving all_validated from PROCESS_CONTROLLER
LITHOGRAPHER/DEPOSITOR/ETCHER finish only after receiving lot_disposition from INTEGRATION_ENGINEER
run_stepper_exposure requires holding STEPPER
run_deposition requires holding DEP_CHAMBER
run_etch_process requires holding ETCH_CHAMBER
run_metrology_measurement requires holding METROLOGY_STATION
check_monitoring requires holding MONITOR
LITHOGRAPHER holds STEPPER while acquiring MONITOR — wafer cannot be ejected mid-exposure, so hold-and-wait is physically unavoidable
DEPOSITOR holds DEP_CHAMBER while acquiring MONITOR — chamber sealed during CVD, so hold-and-wait is physically unavoidable
ETCHER holds ETCH_CHAMBER while acquiring MONITOR — plasma etch in progress, so hold-and-wait is physically unavoidable
if LITHOGRAPHER, DEPOSITOR, and ETCHER all enter hold-and-wait for MONITOR simultaneously, circular wait on MONITOR causes deadlock — requires serializing fab agents' chamber+MONITOR sequences
INTEGRATION_ENGINEER holds STEPPER while acquiring METROLOGY_STATION for in-situ alignment — conflicts with other agents using METROLOGY_STATION in Phase 2
LITHOGRAPHER does hold-and-wait twice: STEPPER+MONITOR (exposure) AND ETCH_CHAMBER+MONITOR (etch) — second pair competes with ETCHER for ETCH_CHAMBER and DEPOSITOR for MONITOR
METROLOGY_ENGINEER receives from LITHOGRAPHER/DEPOSITOR/ETCHER in any order (3-way either/or nondeterminism)
PROCESS_CONTROLLER receives three reports from METROLOGY_ENGINEER in any order (3-way either/or nondeterminism)
PROCESS_CONTROLLER broadcasts validation confirmations to LITHOGRAPHER, DEPOSITOR, ETCHER, and INTEGRATION_ENGINEER
INTEGRATION_ENGINEER broadcasts lot_disposition to LITHOGRAPHER, DEPOSITOR, and ETCHER
Phase 1 (fab+metrology+validation) completes before Phase 2 (post-validation metrology + qualification) begins, enforced by receive guards
LITHOGRAPHER, DEPOSITOR, and ETCHER perform Phase 1 fab operations concurrently
